tagline: You Swim, We Do The Rest!

hero.headline: Your Savannah Pool, Always Swim-Ready
hero.subheadline: You bought a pool to enjoy it, not to spend weekends testing chemicals and scrubbing tiles. Coastal Blue handles everything so the only thing you do is dive in. Every visit includes a photo report so you always know your pool is in expert hands.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From a<br class="hidden md:block"> Team That Treats It Like Their Own
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency repairs, our industry-trained technicians handle every detail so you can stop worrying and start swimming.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Full-service weekly care including chemical balancing, vacuuming, brushing, skimming, and equipment checks. Every visit ends with an emailed photo report and chemistry log.

cards.title: Bi-Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: The same thorough maintenance on a bi-weekly schedule. Ideal for covered pools or seasonal swimmers who want professional care without weekly visits.

cards.title: Equipment Repairs
cards.description: Pumps acting up? Heater not firing? Our technicians diagnose and repair pool equipment fast, using top-rated parts from Pentair, Hayward, and Zodiac.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise testing and balancing that keeps your water crystal clear, safe, and gentle on skin. Basic maintenance chemicals are always included in your plan.

cards.title: Equipment & Product Sales
cards.description: We supply and install premium equipment from Pentair, Zodiac, Polaris, Raypak, and Hayward. Get expert recommendations matched to your pool's specific needs.

cards.title: Filter & System Maintenance
cards.description: Routine filter cleaning, pump basket clearing, and full system inspections to prevent costly breakdowns and keep your pool running at peak efficiency.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Evaluation
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we'll come out, inspect everything, and give you an honest recommendation with straightforward pricing. No pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our licensed, industry-trained technicians arrive on your scheduled day. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, and a detailed photo report emailed to you after every visit.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Oasis
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling and swim-ready all year long. You get peace of mind knowing a family-owned team with 9 years of local experience has your back.

about.label: Why Savannah Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, Community-Rooted Pool Care Since 2017
about.description: Coastal Blue Pool Service was built on a simple promise: treat every pool like it's our own. As a locally owned and family-operated business serving Savannah for 9 years, we've earned the trust of homeowners across The Landings, Wilmington Island, and Pooler through honest communication, dependable scheduling, and results you can see after every single visit.

features.title: Licensed & Insured Technicians
features.description: Every technician on our team is fully licensed, insured, and trained to national industry standards before they ever touch your pool.

features.title: Photo Reports After Every Visit
features.description: You'll receive an emailed summary with photos and chemistry records after each service so you always know exactly what was done.

features.title: Chemicals Included, No Surprises
features.description: Basic maintenance chemicals are included in your service plan. No hidden fees, no surprise charges on your bill.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Chemicals Included.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool. Every plan includes chemicals, photo reports, and equipment checks. No hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our "Swim-Ready" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool isn't crystal clear and swim-ready after any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right at no extra charge. We've built our reputation on dependable results, and we stand behind every single visit with a guarantee that puts your satisfaction first.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in Savannah, The Landings, Wilmington Island, and Pooler are scheduled within 3-5 business days. Contact us and we'll find a day that works with your schedule.

faqs.question: Are chemicals included in the service?
faqs.answer: Yes! Basic maintenance chemicals are included in every weekly and bi-weekly service plan. You won't see surprise chemical charges on your bill. For specialty treatments beyond routine balancing, we'll always discuss costs upfront.

faqs.question: Do I get updates after each visit?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. After every service visit, we email you a detailed summary with photos and chemistry records. You'll always know exactly what was done and how your pool's water quality is trending.

faqs.question: What brands of equipment do you use?
faqs.answer: We exclusively use top-rated brands including Pentair, Zodiac, Polaris, Raypak, and Hayward. These are the most reliable names in the industry, and we can supply, install, and repair all of them.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you're away. Your emailed photo report after each visit gives you complete visibility into what was done.

testimonials.name: Savannah Homeowner
testimonials.text: Coastal Blue Pool Service has been a standout choice for our pool maintenance. After spotty experiences with other pool companies, they deliver consistent, reliable results every single time. Highly recommend them to anyone in the Savannah area.

testimonials.name: Wilmington Island Resident
testimonials.text: They keep our pool in perfect condition year-round. The emailed reports with photos after every visit give us total peace of mind. Professional, honest, and always on schedule.

testimonials.name: Pooler Family
testimonials.text: We switched to Coastal Blue two years ago and haven't looked back. Their technicians are knowledgeable, friendly, and treat our pool like it's their own. The best pool service in the area hands down.
